revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Disambiguation pages]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24608848913|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:石狩]][[uk:Ісікарі]][[zh-yue:石狩]][[zh:石狩]]
'''Ishikari''' (石狩) is a place name in Japan and is also associated with various related terms.
* {{ill|Ishikari Subprefecture|en|Ishikari Subprefecture|qid=Q1997315|lt=Ishikari Promotion Bureau|1=Ishikari Subprefecture}} - One of the branch offices of {{ill|Hokkaido|en|Hokkaido|qid=Q35581|lt=Hokkaido|1=Hokkaido}}. ** {{ill|Ishikari Subprefecture|ja|石狩支庁|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ishikari Subprefecture|1=Ishikari Subprefecture (1897-2010)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q839401}} - A former branch office before being reorganized into the promotion bureau. * {{ill|Ishikari, Hokkaido|en|Ishikari, Hokkaido|qid=Q693221|lt=Ishikari City|1=Ishikari, Hokkaido}} - A city in Hokkaido. * {{ill|Ishikari District, Hokkaido|en|Ishikari District, Hokkaido|qid=Q1185986|lt=Ishikari District|1=Ishikari District, Hokkaido}} - A district in Hokkaido. * {{ill|Ishikari Province|en|Ishikari Province|qid=Q1063877|lt=Ishikari Province|1=Ishikari Province}} - A former administrative division ({{ill|Provinces of Japan|en|Provinces of Japan|qid=Q860290|lt=Ritsuryō provinces|1=Provinces of Japan}}). * {{ill|Ishikari River|en|Ishikari River|qid=Q1061515|lt=Ishikari River|1=Ishikari River}} - A river flowing through central-western Hokkaido, emptying into the Sea of Japan. * {{ill|Mount Ishikari|en|Mount Ishikari|qid=Q6921448|lt=Mount Ishikari|1=Mount Ishikari}} - A mountain in central Hokkaido. * {{ill|Ishikari Nabe|ja|石狩鍋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ishikari Nabe|1=Ishikari-nabe|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11586883}} - A traditional dish of Hokkaido. * "Ishikari" and "Ishikari" (いしかり) - Names of former {{ill|Japanese National Railways|en|Japanese National Railways|qid=Q384011|lt=Japan National Railways|1=Japanese National Railways}} train services. *# From {{ill|1951|en|1951|qid=Q18591|lt=1951|1=1951}} to {{ill|1954|en|1954|qid=Q18581|lt=1954|1=1954}}, a semi-express train "Ishikari" operated between Otaru Station and Asahikawa Station. → See {{ill|Kamui (train)#Postwar operations|ja|カムイ (列車)#戦後運行の展開|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamui (train)#Postwar operations|1=Kamui (train)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q5964030}}. *# From {{ill|1958|en|1958|qid=Q5253|lt=1958|1=1958}} to {{ill|1968|en|1968|qid=Q2644|lt=1968|1=1968}}, an express train "Ishikari" operated between Hakodate Station and Sapporo Station via Tomakomai Station. → See {{ill|Hokuto (train)#History|ja|北斗 (列車)#沿革|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hokuto (train)#History|1=Hokuto (train)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11401761}}. *# From {{ill|1975|en|1975|qid=Q2479|lt=1975|1=1975}} to {{ill|1980|en|1980|qid=Q2439|lt=1980|1=1980}}, a limited express train "Ishikari" operated between Sapporo Station and Asahikawa Station. → See {{ill|Kamui (train)#Introduction of L Tokkyu "Ishikari"|ja|カムイ (列車)#エル特急「いしかり」の登場|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamui (train)#Introduction of L Tokkyu "Ishikari"|1=Kamui (train)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q5964030}}. * Ishikari - A brand name for an {{ill|Kerosene heater|en|Kerosene heater|qid=Q3822403|lt=oil stove|1=Kerosene heater}} formerly manufactured and sold by {{ill|Sharp Corporation|en|Sharp Corporation|qid=Q53227|lt=Sharp Corporation|1=Sharp Corporation}}. * Ishikari - A name for a seaweed {{ill|Tsukudani|en|Tsukudani|qid=Q3276660|lt=tsukudani|1=Tsukudani}} product "Edo Murasaki Ishikari" previously produced and sold by {{ill|Momoya|ja|桃屋|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Momoya|1=Momoya|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11537028}}.
== Related Terms == * {{ill|Ishikari (disambiguation)|en|Ishikari (disambiguation)|qid=Q400189|lt=Ishikari (disambiguation)|1=Ishikari (disambiguation)}} - A disambiguation page. * {{ill|Rātoshikamuy|ja|ラートシカムイ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rātoshikamuy|qq=}}
{{disambiguation}}
{{translated page|ja|石狩|version=91863681|comment=Imported full ja history}}
